title: AI Shocks Again: Google Post-AGI , New Claude, Microsoft 7 AI, 92% Human Robot, Fable 5 Backlash
summary: A YouTube news segment covering major AI developments including Google's post-AGI research, Anthropic's Claude evolution, Microsoft's seven new AI models, China's MOYA humanoid robot, and backlash to Anthropic's Fable 5 release. The segment positions these as significant industry shocks and notes emerging interest in prompt engineering as a new opportunity area.
writeup: This AI Revolution segment rounds up several recent developments: Google's post-AGI research, Anthropic's Claude evolution, seven new AI models from Microsoft, China's MOYA humanoid robot, and the backlash following Anthropic's Fable 5 release. It frames these as major industry shifts and points to prompt engineering as an emerging opportunity area. The concepts touched include personal AGI, humanoid robots, and multimodal learning.
